character.bio: A man who resembles M. Bison, the leader of Shadaloo, who was believed to be dead. He has lost his memories, but has violent tendencies. He appears in locations related to Shadaloo, guided by Psycho Power.

bison_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: 3  frames of recovery added on armor hit or if the attack missesProduces a ground bound during a mid-air hit17 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

bison_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentProduces a crumple stun for 32 frames when the attack lands as a Punish CounterJuggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

bison_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

bison_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter

bison_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

bison_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

bison_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

bison_psycho_hammer_h.note: Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

bison_hover_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

bison_shadow_hammer.note: Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

bison_l_psycho_crusher_attack_l.context: (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set)
bison_l_psycho_crusher_attack_l.input: (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set) (Hold ←) → + LP
bison_l_psycho_crusher_attack_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 15Considered airborne from frames 20 - 29Clashes with projectiles (Once)

bison_when_psycho_mine_is_embedded_l_psy.displayName: [when Psycho Mine is embedded]L Psycho Crusher Attack
bison_when_psycho_mine_is_embedded_l_psy.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 15Considered airborne from frames 20 - 29Clashes with projectilesDetonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit (Once)

bison_m_psycho_crusher_attack_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 21Considered airborne from frames 26 - 45Clashes with projectiles (Once)

bison_od_psycho_crusher_attack.context: (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set)

bison_l_shadow_rise_l.note: Can transition to Headpress and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46Is considered airborne from frame 9

bison_m_shadow_rise_m.note: Can transition to Headpress and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46Is considered airborne from frame 9

bison_h_shadow_rise_h.note: Can transition to Headpress and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46Is considered airborne from frame 9

bison_od_shadow_rise.note: Can transition to Overdrive Headpress and Devil's Reverse from frames 16-42Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 8Is considered airborne from frame 9

bison_head_press.note: Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blockedCan transition to Somersault Skull Diver from frame 23 until landing when this attack hits or is blocked.

bison_od_head_press.note: Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blockedProduces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

bison_devil_reverse.context: (During Shadow Rise) (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set)
bison_devil_reverse.input: (During Shadow Rise) (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set) P
bison_devil_reverse.note: Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked

bison_when_psycho_mine_is_embedded_devil.note: Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blockedDetonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

bison_od_devil_reverse.context: (During Shadow Rise) (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set)
bison_od_devil_reverse.input: (During Shadow Rise) (Effect changes when a Psycho Mine is set) P

bison_when_psycho_mine_is_embedded_od_de.displayName: [when Psycho Mine is embedded]OD Devil Reverse
bison_when_psycho_mine_is_embedded_od_de.note: Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

bison_sa1_knee_press_nightmare.note: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 11Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

bison_sa2_psycho_punisher.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 25Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 40%

bison_sa3_unlimited_psycho_crusher.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
bison_sa3_unlimited_psycho_crusher.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
bison_sa3_unlimited_psycho_crusher.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 15The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

bison_ca_unlimited_psycho_crusher.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
bison_ca_unlimited_psycho_crusher.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
bison_ca_unlimited_psycho_crusher.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 15The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

bison_deadly_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

bison_death_tower.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

bison_drive_impact_hell_twist.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks between frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

bison_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
bison_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
bison_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

bison_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

bison_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
bison_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
bison_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

bison_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameFully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

bison_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

bison_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

bison_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
bison_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
